race.description: Forresters Beach Retirement Village Social Group Mdn Hcp
race.comment: RISING REVOLUTION (7) jumped well first-up and just failed to close off with the 58kg for a respectable third over 1100m at Hawkesbury. Clearly come back well and can get over from the draw and take holding out. MIND YA BIZZ (5) slashing return from last on the turn with a close-up second as fav over 1100m at Hawkesbury. Blinkers go on from the outside gate and will need a good ride from Tommy Berry. COPYCAT (6) in need of the run first-up from the wide gate with a battling seventh in the heavy going over 1000m at Kembla Grange. Extra trip in his favour in the small field. ASSUMED (11) good type resuming for her second prep. No match for the smart Journeyman when eleventh over 1200m at Warwick Farm in a Super Maiden last February. Back with the two trials and a forward showing is anticipated with Grima's claim.
